android.widget.TextView.text: * The curious case of Des Plaines resident Graciela Dela Torre, Nippon Life Insurance Company and ChatGPT via the International Business Times… Dela Torre and her lawyer initially pursued a disability claim against Nippon Life Insurance Company after she suffered carpal tunnel and tennis elbow on the job in August 2019. She later stopped qualifying as [...]
